raw_text:
40. Tool Validation Engineer

Job Summary  
Validates tools and dies to ensure they meet design intent, functionality, and production 
readiness.  
Key Responsibilities  
• Conduc t tool trials and validation processes  
• Verify dimensional accuracy and performance  
• Develop validation plans and reports  
• Identify issues and recommend improvements  
• Coordinate with design, production, and quality teams  
• Ensure compliance with industry st andards  
Required Skills  
• Tooling validation and testing knowledge  
• GD&T and inspection expertise  
• Analytical and problem -solving skills  
• Documentation and reporting  
Qualification  
• B.E / B.Tech in Mechanical / Production  
Experience  
• 3–6 years  
Salary (India ) 
• ₹35,000 – ₹70,000 per month
